code:
data TokenBucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ bucket: TokenBucket) -> Bool
  if bucket.tokens >= 1
    mut b = bucket
    b.tokens = bucket.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

let bucket = TokenBucket(tokens: 3)

mut i = 0
while i < 5
  if allow(bucket)
    print("ALLOW")
  else
    print("DENY")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
